LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANT KATHRYN FORTINO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS VOID DUE TO IMPROPER SERVICE. SUBSTITUTE SERVICE WAS NOT PROPERLY EFFECTUATED. DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED EVIDENCE SHOWING THAT 50 FREMONT STREET WAS NOT DEFENDANT'S USUAL PLACE OF BUSINESS OR USUAL MAILING ADDRESS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT KATHRYN FORTINO's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is granted. The default judgment is void due to improper service. Substitute service was not properly effectuated. Defendant has presented evidence showing that 50 Fremont Street was not defendant's usual place of business or usual mailing address. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2013 Continued To May-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2012 Off Calendar

Memo In Support Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Vicki Van Fleet Esq. appeared for plaintiff Schoenberg Family Law Group, P.C., et al.

Plaintiff Witness Debra R. Schoenberg, was placed under oath and direct examined.

Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Schoenberg Family Law Group P.C., and Debra R. Schoenberg, and against the Defaulted Defendant Kathryn Fortino as follows:

Damages/Principal - $33,299.42
Prejudgment Interest - $7,385.37
Attorney's Fees - $4,963.74
Costs - $1,307.35, for a total judgment in the amount of $46,955.88

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
